epochTotals.unpaidPoolBasis: Exact chain settlement remainder; not per-host allocation.

metadata.generatedFrom: saved raw chain cache and derived CSV outputs
metadata.title: Epoch 265 cPoC attack timeline

nodes.dropLossBasis: Observed cPoC drop loss: sum of positive confirmed-weight drops across saved cPoC checkpoints / total epoch weight * epoch reward.
nodes.estimatedLostBasis: Estimated from exact unpaid pool allocated by observed confirmation-weight drops.
nodes.sourceCompensationBasis: E265 source model: max(0, entry weight / total epoch weight * epoch reward - actual rewards).
nodes.vote67PaidBasis: Vote #67 Kimi Restitution e265 amount from the source compensation model.

payoutEstimates.allocationBasis: Exact unpaid pool allocated across address-level positive confirmation-weight drops.
payoutEstimates.precision: Estimate only; proof-grade per-host amount requires settlement replay.
payoutEstimates.sourceCompensationBasis: E265 source model from votkon/gonka-kimi-restitution: max(0, entry weight / total epoch weight * epoch reward - actual rewards), using GONKA denom 1e9.

warnings: Source compensation is a counterfactual model, not a direct gov-wallet remainder allocation.
Drop-allocation estimates remain diagnostic only and are not shown as the primary compensation value.
Chain data shows confirmation-weight drops and reward settlement effects; attack attribution is investigation context.
